underlying_goal: Complete Phase 57 spike work (Spikes 007 and 008), integrate findings into CONTEXT.md, and verify readiness for next phase planning

brief_summary: User wanted to complete Phase 57 spikes and update CONTEXT.md with verified findings; achieved with 15 clean commits after correcting overstated claims and broadening telemetry framing.
